raw_source.title: [Global/Remote] Gate.io is looking for Product Manager
raw_source.body:
## About Company
Gate.io was founded in 2013 and has been in the industry for 8 years. It's dedicated to being a safe, stable and trustworthy digital currency exchange. It is the first trading platform to provide a 100% margin audit. Gate.io has been selected as one of the best global digital currency exchanges many times. It is currently one of the TOP 10 exchanges in the world with real trading volume.

Join us and be a part of the most valuable company in the blockchain industry.

## Salary and Benefits


## Contacts
Contact HR through join@mail.gate.io 
or
contact Nicole (WeChat: xxzj_preeminent) in Rebase Community.

## Position: Product Manager - Fulltime Remote

## Job requirements
Responsibilities:
- Design the products in Gate.io with the team
- Support our customers

Requirements:
- University degrees
- English/Chinese, good about speaking, reading, writing.
- Experience in Product Design.
- Experience in team management.
raw_source.author: xrdavies
